title: Hybrid preload for N:1 + 1:N with threading
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.feed_with_mixed_strategies/0`: return published Posts with `:author` (belongs_to) preloaded via JOIN (efficient for single rows), and `:comments` AND `:tags` (has_many and many_to_many) preloaded via separate queries. The `author` join binding must be threaded into `preload: [author: u]` AND the other two must be bare struct preloads in the SAME preload list: `preload: [author: u, :comments, :tags]`. Include ordering and filter. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Combines join-preload + struct-preload + many_to_many preload in a single preload list. Requires knowing the nuance for each association type.
research_citation: oliver-kriska: 'Separate queries for has_many, JOIN for belongs_to' + georgeguimaraes: '10x memory' guidance
